description: Ganoderma BSR advancing in mature plantations. Up to 15% infection in some blocks.
advisoryText: Apply soil mounding. Trunk injection with hexaconazole. Mark infected palms for replanting.

description: Rigidoporus microporus mycelia spreading rapidly during high rainfall season.
advisoryText: Drench collar region with hexaconazole. Isolate infected trees with trenches.

description: SLCMV spreading rapidly via whitefly vectors, showing severe mosaic symptoms on young leaves.
advisoryText: Use only certified clean planting stakes. Plant resistant varieties.

description: Spodoptera frugiperda larvae detected in whorls of vegetative stage maize.
advisoryText: Apply spinetoram 11.7 SC or chlorantraniliprole 18.5 SC into the whorl. Use whorl application method.

description: Fusarium Wilt TR4 confirmed in commercial plantations. Strict quarantine required.
advisoryText: Quarantine affected areas immediately. Destroy infected plants with herbicide. Disinfect equipment.

description: Hemileia vastatrix outbreak exceeding 30% defoliation in highland robusta/arabica plantations.
advisoryText: Apply copper Bordeaux mixture 1%. Prune for better air circulation.

description: Widespread BLB outbreak reported due to extended monsoon moisture and high temperatures.
advisoryText: Apply streptomycin sulfate 500ppm. Drain fields immediately. Use copper oxychloride as preventive spray.

description: SLCMV spreading rapidly via whitefly vectors, showing severe mosaic symptoms on young leaves.
advisoryText: Use only certified clean planting stakes. Plant resistant varieties.

description: ToLCV outbreak spreading via whitefly vectors in warm, dry conditions.
advisoryText: Rogue infected plants. Control whitefly with neem oil 3000ppm + imidacloprid. Use silver mulch.

description: Late-season PBW infestation observed in bolls, bypassing early BT cotton resistance.
advisoryText: Install pheromone traps (5/ha). Apply emamectin benzoate 5 SG if threshold exceeds 10%.

description: BPH population surge causing hopperburn damage in multiple paddies.
advisoryText: Apply imidacloprid 17.8 SL. Implement alternate wetting and drying. Avoid excessive nitrogen.

description: Yellow rust race detected. Rapid spread expected due to favorable cool and humid conditions.
advisoryText: Immediately apply propiconazole 25 EC at 0.1%. Switch to resistant varieties next season.
